name: Paraguayan Spanish
notes: Paraguayan Spanish. Uniquely influenced by Guaraní bilingualism (90%+ of population bilingual). Guaraní substrate: prenasalised stops [ᵐb, ⁿd, ᵑɡ] in contact speech, possible glottal stop and nasal vowels in Guaraní loans. Some žeísmo from Argentine influence. Coda /s/ generally conserved.
